title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Indian Partnership Act, 1932. 1[(2) It extends to the whole of India 2[3***].] (3) It shall come into force on the 1st day of October, 1932, except section 69, which shall come into force on the 1st day of October, 1933.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A. O. 1950, for sub-section (2). 2. Subs. by Act 3 of 1951, s. 3 and the Schedule, for "except Part B States". 3. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 34 of 2019, s. 95 and the Fifth Schedule (w.e.f. 31-10- 2019).
